'''Trubor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented the planet [[Chad/Legends|Chadra]].

During the [[Battle of Ryloth (Diversity Alliance Crisis)|Battle of Ryloth]], where Trubor was present, he was killed in the crossfire.

{{Char-stub}}
